info.english_meaning: to nourishto bring upto support to protect to take care to feed
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' DAraRe pozayetpuzwO puzyet puzRAti pozati ' ( Slo. 171) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'pro tye agnayo'gnizu viSvaM puzyanti vAryam' (f॰5.6.6) praSabdaH prakarze pozasya kArtsnyamAha
